exercises.name: Jogging in Place
exercises.description: Jog in place with light, bouncy steps, keeping knees slightly bent. Gradually increase pace. Raises heart rate and prepares legs for lateral movement.

exercises.name: Arm Circles
exercises.description: Extend arms to sides, make small circles growing to large circles. 15s forward, 15s backward. Loosens shoulder joints for stroke mechanics.

exercises.name: Wrist Rotations
exercises.description: Hold arms in front, rotate wrists in circles. 15s clockwise, 15s counterclockwise. Warms up wrist joint for spin generation.

exercises.name: Trunk Rotations
exercises.description: Feet shoulder-width, rotate upper body left-right letting arms swing freely. Keep hips stable. Mimics rotational movement in strokes.

exercises.name: Hip Circles
exercises.description: Hands on hips, make large circular motions. 15s each direction. Mobilizes hip joints for low stance and weight transfer.

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.description: Jog in place driving knees to waist height. Pump arms in sync. Activates hip flexors and explosive leg drive.

exercises.name: Dynamic Lunges
exercises.description: Step forward into lunge, lower back knee toward ground, push back, alternate legs. Keep torso upright. Stretches hip flexors, activates glutes.

exercises.name: Shadow Play
exercises.description: Without ball, perform forehand and backhand strokes with proper footwork. Focus on weight transfer and follow-through. Grooves muscle memory.

exercises.name: Side Shuffle
exercises.description: Shuffle laterally from forehand to backhand corner and back. Stay low, feet wide, never cross feet. Foundational footwork for table coverage.

exercises.name: Crossover Step
exercises.description: From backhand corner, cross right foot over left to reach forehand corner, shuffle back. Covers larger distances faster than shuffling.

exercises.name: Falkenberg Footwork
exercises.description: Classic 3-point: forehand from BH corner → backhand from BH side → forehand from FH corner. Repeat. Gold-standard professional footwork pattern.

exercises.name: In-Out Movement
exercises.description: Step in toward table for short ball, quickly step back for deep ball. Alternate. Trains forward-backward movement for short serves.

exercises.name: Two-Point Rally
exercises.description: Ball alternates to FH and BH. Move using shuffle steps, return to center between shots. Focus on being in position before ball arrives.

exercises.name: Triangle Footwork
exercises.description: 3 markers in triangle behind table. Move to each using shuffle/crossover steps, simulate stroke at each. Combines lateral and forward-backward.

exercises.name: Pivot Drill
exercises.description: From BH corner, pivot around left foot to play forehand from BH side. Rotate hips and shoulders fully, recover. Critical for aggressive FH players.

exercises.name: Reaction Ball
exercises.description: Drop/throw reaction ball against floor or wall, catch quickly. Unpredictable bounce forces rapid hand-eye adjustments. Use regular ball if no reaction ball.

exercises.name: Fast Hands Counter
exercises.description: Stand close to table, rally fast counter-drives. Minimize backswing, short punchy strokes, quick recovery. Trains fast-twitch reflexes.

exercises.name: Multi-Ball Speed
exercises.description: Feeder rapidly sends balls to alternating locations. Move and return each ball quickly without sacrificing form. Increase speed as consistency improves.

exercises.name: Quick-Fire Serves
exercises.description: Serve 20-30 balls in rapid succession with minimal pause. Vary spin and placement. Builds serve consistency under time pressure.

exercises.name: Ladder Lateral
exercises.description: Move laterally through agility ladder, both feet in each square. Stay low in ready stance. Develops quick precise foot placement.

exercises.name: Ladder In-Out
exercises.description: Move forward through ladder: both feet in, both feet out wide on each rung. Stay on balls of feet, arms ready. Trains rapid foot coordination.

exercises.name: Cone Touch
exercises.description: 4-5 cones in semicircle 2m from center. Sprint to touch each, return to center. Simulates explosive direction changes during rallies.

exercises.name: Random Direction
exercises.description: Partner calls directions (left/right/forward/back), react with 2-3 explosive steps, return to center. Trains game-like reaction to unpredictable placement.

exercises.name: Box Jumps
exercises.description: Jump onto low box (30-40cm) with both feet, land softly in squat, step down. 10-15 reps. Builds explosive leg power for fast recovery.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.description: Feet shoulder-width, lower until thighs parallel, drive up. Chest up, weight on heels. Builds leg endurance for low ready position.

exercises.name: Forearm Plank
exercises.description: Hold plank on forearms, body straight head-to-heels. Engage core, avoid hip sag. Core stability for rotational power in strokes.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.description: Support on forearm, feet stacked, hips lifted in line. 30s per side. Strengthens obliques for forehand loop rotation.

exercises.name: Resistance Band FH
exercises.description: Band at waist height behind you, hold like racket. Perform forehand motion against resistance, 15-20 reps. Strengthens forehand stroke muscles.

exercises.name: Calf Raises
exercises.description: Rise on balls of feet, lower slowly. 20-25 reps. Strong calves support ready stance and explosive first-step movement.

exercises.name: Quad Stretch Walk
exercises.description: Walk slowly, pull rear foot to glute each step, hold 2-3s. Keep upright. Stretches quads fatigued from low playing stance.

exercises.name: Hamstring Stretch
exercises.description: Heel on low surface, hinge forward at hips with straight back. Hold 20-25s per leg. Releases tension from bent-knee posture.

exercises.name: Shoulder Stretch
exercises.description: Pull one arm across chest with opposite hand, hold 15s per arm. Keep shoulder down. Releases posterior shoulder from stroke fatigue.

exercises.name: Wrist Flexor Stretch
exercises.description: Extend arm palm up, gently pull fingers back. Hold 15s per arm. Prevents wrist strain from racket grip.

exercises.name: Deep Breathing
exercises.description: Inhale through nose 4s, hold 4s, exhale through mouth 6s. Repeat 5-6 times. Activates parasympathetic system, accelerates recovery.
